title: I wear my sunglasses at night
description: Adds cool sunnies to every mob in minecraft
body:
This texture pack adds sunglasses to all mobs in minecraft.
![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dcc5cb3a33f5592ba0d77a261707cd75dacb727_0.webp)
![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a952d338222e4562c81450328038b297b0da98a7_0.webp)

Once you add it to your world then everything starts getting "COOL". I also made some blocks wear sunglasses along with totems of undying. If you have any Ideas for me to add make sure tell me in the description. These projects are possible because of your generous donations.

 Have fun and God bless you :)

 

Try out my maps!

Forests and Fields

The Mysterious Island

Seven Survival Islands

 

 

J.M.J
